title: Bucket Elegance
description: A texture pack that improves the look of Minecraft buckets with cleaner and more detailed designs.
body:
**Bucket Elegance** – a texture pack that redesigns Minecraft buckets only!

A simple texture pack that changes how buckets look in Minecraft. It gives them a new style while keeping the vanilla feel.

![Here's what it looks like](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42347afe2537512b7be0e6b5e254ac5aa3c6e889.gif)
